sentences.translation: Islam poklanja veliku pažnju bontonu govora.
sentences.translationEn: Islam pays great attention to the etiquette of speech.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: "Ko vjeruje u Allaha i Sudnji dan, neka govori dobro ili neka šuti" [Bilježi el-Buhari u Knjizi o bontonu].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: "Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day, let him speak good or remain silent" [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of Manners].

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ يُعَلِّمُنَا أَهَمِّيَّةَ حِفْظِ اللِّسَانِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis nas uči važnosti čuvanja jezika.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith teaches us the importance of guarding the tongue.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُسْلِمُ لَا يَتَكَلَّمُ إِلَّا بِالْكَلَامِ النَّافِعِ.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim only speaks beneficial words.

sentences.arabic: وَإِذَا لَمْ يَجِدْ خَيْرًا، فَالسُّكُوتُ أَفْضَلُ لَهُ لِيَتَجَنَّبَ الْآثَامَ.
sentences.translation: Ako ne nađe ništa dobro za reći, onda mu je šutnja bolja kako bi izbjegao grijehe.
sentences.translationEn: If he finds nothing good to say, then silence is better for him to avoid sins.
